revision.text:
This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]]. <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <!-- etc. --> | module = {{EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME | child=yes <!-- or embed=yes or subbox=yes --> | parameter-1 = | parameter-2 = | parameter-3 = | parameter-4 = | <!-- etc. --> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude> [[Category:Template ff templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category: namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category: namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category: namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>
[[Category: namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]].
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" style="overflow: auto;"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''[[et cetera|etc.]]'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> | module = <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{1|{{{template|<includeonly>{{BASEPAGENAME}}</includeonly><noinclude>EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME</noinclude>}}}}}} | {{#if:{{{parameter|}}} | {{{parameter}}}=yes | child=yes <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''or'' embed=yes ''or'' subbox=yes <nowiki>--></nowiki>}} | {{{2|{{{example_parameter1|parameter-1}}}}}} = | {{{3|{{{example_parameter2|parameter-2}}}}}} = | {{{4|{{{example_parameter3|parameter-3}}}}}} = | {{{5|{{{example_parameter4|parameter-4}}}}}} = | <nowiki><!--</nowiki> ''etc.'' <nowiki>--></nowiki> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude>

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]]. <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <!-- etc. --> | module = {{EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME | child=yes <!-- or embed=yes or subbox=yes --> | parameter-1 = | parameter-2 = | parameter-3 = | parameter-4 = | <!-- etc. --> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude> [[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]]. <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | <!-- etc. --> | module = {{EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME | child=yes <!-- or embed=yes or subbox=yes --> | parameter-1 = | parameter-2 = | parameter-3 = | parameter-4 = | <!-- etc. --> }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude> [[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: This infobox may be used to create a genre-specific section within {{tl|Infobox person}} (or similar [[:Category:People and person infobox templates|biographical infobox templates]]) for cases where a person may be notable in more than one field; a generic example is shown below. For guidance on usage, see [[Wikipedia:Infobox modules]]. Also see the [[Template:Infobox]] documentation which explains [[Template:Infobox/doc#Embedding|embedding]] and [[Template:Infobox/doc#Subboxes|subboxes]]. <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Infobox person | name = | image = | caption = | birth_date = | birth_place = | | module = {{EMBEDDED TEMPLATE NAME | child=yes | parameter-1 = | parameter-2 = | parameter-3 = | parameter-4 = | }} }} </syntaxhighlight><noinclude> [[Category:Template namespace templates]] [[Category:Documentation shared content templates]] </noinclude>
